description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has a round neckline with snipped edges and tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, chipped mural look graphic print on the front and yellow stitch detailing on the hemsFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWram iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your casual style with this white T-shirt from probase. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
